editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=3 of 227 available trials included; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered. Justify exclusions or expand eligibility.
Pooled 0.76 diverges from Lipson 2018 benchmark (RR 0.85 [0.80, 0.90]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
I² = 99.2% (considerable); show subgroup/strata estimates alongside pooled.
QoL / PROs reported in 2 trial(s) (SGRQ) but not in headline pool; consider adding as a secondary analysis rather than omitting.
